Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an instantly actionable report that highlights the most urgent customer-impacting parts, eliminating the need to manually cross-reference multiple sources.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered parts, pre-populated with the relevant status, expected timelines, and dead-end notifications.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enables the team to send accurate, consistent customer updates in a fraction of the time, reducing customer uncertainty and internal communication overhead.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all two-piece rotor offerings.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Captures comprehensive competitor and supplier catalog data automatically, eliminating days of manual research across three separate websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlapping coverage and gaps where DFC has no matching two-piece rotor.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Produces a clear picture of where DFC is competitive and where opportunity exists, directly informing product development and sourcing priorities.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to customers to gather demand data for specific vehicle fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signals from actual customers to validate which gaps are worth filling, enabling data-driven product decisions rather than guesswork.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, consolidated reference document that Dino can act on immediately, replacing a fragmented process that would otherwise require manual aggregation across multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad campaigns and pulls the full ad copy from every live creative across all ad sets.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility into every word of active ad copy at scale, making it possible to audit hundreds of ads in moments instead of reviewing them one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Reads through all collected ad copy and flags every instance where a specified phrase or term appears, recording the exact field and copy location of each match.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints problematic or targeted language across the entire ad account instantly, enabling compliance reviews or messaging audits that would take a team hours to complete manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the exact phrase match, the field it appeared in, and the surrounding copy for context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a clear, actionable audit report on demand, giving the team everything they need to review and remediate flagged ads without any manual searching.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow, now tracking **53 agents total** — 24 Completed, 9 In Progress, and 20 Planned. This week we added two new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool that identifies local businesses needing warehouse or office space and sends warm intro emails for the 13140 Midway Place property, and **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, an agent in development for analyzing and optimizing Amazon ad campaigns across both R1 and DFC. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** officially moved to Completed this week — great work to everyone involved in getting that across the finish line. The team continues to execute at a strong pace and the pipeline is looking healthy heading into the week ahead!
